records.ety: [F. ternit, L. aeternitas, fr. aeternus. See Etern.]

defs: Infinite duration, without beginning in the past or end in the future; also, duration without end in the future; endless time.
quotes: The high and lofty One, that inhabiteth eternity.

defs: Condition which begins at death; immortality.
quotes: Thou know'st 't is common; all that lives must die, Passing through nature to eternity.
